summary: Show a Company Inspection Template Item Evidence Configuration
description: Show the specified Company Inspection Template Item Evidence Configuration.

parameters.name: template_item_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the inspection template item.

item_id.description: Item ID for the Evidence Configuration

status_ids.description: Array of Inspection Item Status IDs that would trigger the requirement of a Photo

response_option_ids.description: Array of Inspection Response Option IDs that would trigger the requirement of a Photo

status_ids.description: Array of Inspection Item Status IDs that would trigger the requirement of a Observation

response_option_ids.description: Array of Inspection Response Option IDs that would trigger the requirement of a Observation
